title: Cigar/ettes
body:
Now, thanks to this mod, you can continue your bad addictions in Minecraft! What are you waiting for! Create your own special drink by drying grass! I hope you understand what I mean by drink. Thanks to this mod, I'm sure you'll come across new flowers while walking in nature! Don't forget to collect them!
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04cf52e070d26d1895659148d594e24290548e5e.png)
